description: Sentora PYUSD is a MetaMorpho V1.1 ERC4626 vault that allocates PayPal USD deposits across Morpho Blue lending markets selected by Sentora as curator. The vault inherits the standard MetaMorpho contract surface: a 3-day timelock on owner-initiated parameter changes, a per-market supply-cap mechanism, and a guardian veto over pending submissions. As of the most recent discovery the vault holds {{vaultPositionsTotal}} on Morpho Blue against an active cap envelope of 400M PYUSD spread across five markets (cbBTC, wstETH, weETH, an ETH-collateralized market, and WBTC), plus four decommissioned markets that retain only legacy positions. Pricing is provided by ten oracle adapters that route to Chainlink, RedStone, and Lido feeds.

eth:0xe8C9C99EcaD0686A14A00d8521c572281E.name: Sentora Owner 1/1 Multisig
eth:0xe8C9C99EcaD0686A14A00d8521c572281E.description: Single-signer Gnosis Safe controlling all owner-only vault parameters: fee, fee recipient, curator, allocator set, name and symbol, and the timelock and guardian submission flow. Owner-initiated changes to timelock, guardian, and per-market caps are all delay-protected for 3 days. Reaches {{ownerSafeReachableCapital}} in vault deposits via the standard MetaMorpho permission set.

eth:0x9e396dE3312D373b87F9BD8763fb48184b.name: Sentora Curator/Guardian 1/1 Multisig
eth:0x9e396dE3312D373b87F9BD8763fb48184b.description: Single-signer Gnosis Safe holding both the curator role (submit and accept market caps and removals, delay-protected) and the guardian role (veto-only revoke of pending owner and curator submissions during the timelock window). Holds {{curatorGuardianReachableCapital}} in reachable capital but its non-veto reach is bounded by per-market caps; veto power is the only path that can act without a delay.

eth:0xC4Ba4e822C420452fe2BAB93211208D3Cc.name: Allocator EOA (0xC4Ba...6b31)
eth:0xC4Ba4e822C420452fe2BAB93211208D3Cc.description: Externally-owned account designated as an allocator. Can call setSupplyQueue, updateWithdrawQueue, and reallocate to move funds between already-capped markets. Cannot create new market exposure — every market it can route to must first be approved through the curator's timelocked submitCap flow.

eth:0xBBBBBbbBBb9cC5e90e3b3Af64bdAF62C37.name: Morpho Blue
eth:0xBBBBBbbBBb9cC5e90e3b3Af64bdAF62C37.description: Singleton lending primitive that holds every vault deposit. The vault routes PYUSD into Morpho Blue markets via supply, withdraw, and supplyCollateral calls; vault accounting reads positions back through Morpho Blue's market state. A bug in Morpho Blue would directly expose the entire {{vaultPositionsTotal}} held by the vault.

eth:0xfd32fA2ca22c76dD6E550706Ad913FC6CE.name: Morpho PublicAllocator
eth:0xfd32fA2ca22c76dD6E550706Ad913FC6CE.description: Permissionless rebalancer that anyone can call to move liquidity between Morpho Blue markets within bounds set by the vault's allocators. Pre-registered as an allocator on this vault, so its on-chain configuration constrains the maximum reallocation it can trigger per call.

eth:0x2665701293fCbEB223D11A08D826563EDc.name: Chainlink BTC/USD
eth:0x2665701293fCbEB223D11A08D826563EDc.description: Prices the cbBTC market (200M PYUSD cap). A stale or manipulated read drives bad-debt or under-collateralized borrows on the cbBTC collateral.

eth:0xF4030086522a5bEEa4988F8cA5B36dbC97.name: Chainlink BTC/USD (alt)
eth:0xF4030086522a5bEEa4988F8cA5B36dbC97.description: Prices both the weETH market (via the LBTC fundamental adapter) and the WBTC market (50M PYUSD each, 100M combined cap). Shared between two BTC-correlated markets.

eth:0xfdFD9C85aD200c506Cf9e21F1FD8dd0193.name: Chainlink WBTC/BTC
eth:0xfdFD9C85aD200c506Cf9e21F1FD8dd0193.description: WBTC peg ratio used by the WBTC market (50M PYUSD cap). De-pegging or feed failure on this single feed unbalances the WBTC borrow side without affecting the broader BTC pricing.

eth:0x4F67e4d9BD67eFa28236013288737D39Ae.name: Lido WstETHPriceFeed
eth:0x4F67e4d9BD67eFa28236013288737D39Ae.description: Tracks wstETH/stETH conversion. Feeds the wstETH market (50M PYUSD cap).

eth:0x5f4eC3Df9cbd43714FE2740f5E3616155c.name: Chainlink ETH/USD
eth:0x5f4eC3Df9cbd43714FE2740f5E3616155c.description: Prices ETH-correlated collateral in the wstETH market and one additional ETH-denominated market (100M PYUSD combined cap).

eth:0x5c9C449BbC9a6075A2c061dF312a35fd1E.name: Chainlink (ETH-correlated)
eth:0x5c9C449BbC9a6075A2c061dF312a35fd1E.description: Base feed for the secondary ETH-denominated market (50M PYUSD cap).

eth:0xb415eAA355D8440ac7eCB602D3fb67ccC1.name: RedStone LBTC Fundamental
eth:0xb415eAA355D8440ac7eCB602D3fb67ccC1.description: Custodian-attestation-driven LBTC reserve feed used in the weETH market's adapter (50M PYUSD cap).

eth:0x8f1dF6D7F2db73eECE86a18b4381F4707b.name: Chainlink USDC/USD
eth:0x8f1dF6D7F2db73eECE86a18b4381F4707b.description: Quote feed used by every active market to denominate the loan-asset (PYUSD/USD via USDC proxy). Aggregates across the full 400M PYUSD active-market cap envelope: a stale read here affects every active market simultaneously.

eth:0xa569d910839Ae8865Da8F8e70FfFb0cBA8.name: Chainlink (decommissioned)
eth:0xa569d910839Ae8865Da8F8e70FfFb0cBA8.description: Base feed for the decommissioned sUSDe market (cap=0) and a co-base feed for the decommissioned Pendle PT market. Vault no longer accepts new supply against this feed.

eth:0xfF30586cD0F29eD462364C7e81375FC0C7.name: Chainlink (decommissioned)
eth:0xfF30586cD0F29eD462364C7e81375FC0C7.description: Base feed for the decommissioned sUSDS market (cap=0). No active risk surface.

eth:0x8fFfFfd4AfB6115b954Bd326cbe7B4BA57.name: Chainlink (decommissioned)
eth:0x8fFfFfd4AfB6115b954Bd326cbe7B4BA57.description: Base feed for the decommissioned syrupUSDC (Maple) market (cap=0). No active risk surface.

eth:0xC6Be540fF8A71B413b4E56C00B4B4Ea31c.name: Pendle Chainlink Oracle (decommissioned)
eth:0xC6Be540fF8A71B413b4E56C00B4B4Ea31c.description: Pendle PT pricing adapter for the decommissioned Pendle market (cap=0). No active risk surface.

eth:0x19b3cD7032B8C062E8d44EaCad661a0970.name: MetaMorphoV1_1 (PYUSD)
eth:0x19b3cD7032B8C062E8d44EaCad661a0970.description: The vault contract itself, holding {{vaultPositionsTotal}} as Morpho Blue supply positions. Depositors mint senPYUSD shares against this position; the vault's allocators can move the underlying PYUSD between approved Morpho Blue markets without an additional delay, but cannot route into markets that have not been timelocked-approved by the curator.

codeAndAudits.title: Code & Audits
codeAndAudits.description: Smart contract analysis and audit history
